RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT MAILED TO MARIA MENDOZA ON JUNE 30, 2014. ENVELOPE STAMPED "MOVED - RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UN ABLE TO FORWARD." THIS REMARK IS IN REGARD TO THE NOTICE THAT WAS MAILED TO 899 GUERRERO ST., SF, CA 94110.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY MARIA MENDOZA ON JUL-29-2014 - DENIED. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---FELIPE GARCIA. JUAN RIVAS, THE PROCESS SERVER WHO SERVED PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM ON THE DEFENDANT WAS IN COURT AND TESTIFIED UNDER OATH THAT HE PERSONALLY SERVED THE CLAIM ON THE DEFENDANT AND THE PLAINTIFF WITNESSED THE SERVICE ON THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-04-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:14am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles; Clerk J. Kong, D525, Not Reported.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal.

Appellant:No appearance by Maria Mendoza
Respondent:Raul Vasquez appears with counsel Robert P. Garcia, Esq. and Witness Juan Ribas.

Parties, previously sworn, respectivel present their cases in the narrative, and respond to questions from Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles.
9:15am: Court inform counsel that 20 minutes recess to give Maria Mendoza to appear.
9:40am: Matter is resume; Clerk sworn Raul Vasquez and witness Juan Rias. No appearance by appellant Maria Mendoza.

9:45am: Matter is submitted.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jul-29-2014 Denied

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Feb-24-2012 Judgment Entered
